_meta.description: Comprehensive NLP prompt catalog for end-to-end testing of the Ask AI system. Covers every intent, entity type, tool, route, and edge case.
_meta.usage: Import in test runner or NLP settings page to batch-test query classification, tool routing, and response quality.

prompts.q: show me what you can do
what kind of questions can I ask?
I want to run a simulation
take me to the what-if tool

categories.name: Resource Lookup — Existence Check
categories.notes: Tests the tricky 'is there anyone named X' patterns — these were buggy before

prompts.q: is there any one named Piyush in any of the PODs?
do we have someone named Ojas?
does any team have a person called Piyush?
is there a developer named Piyush?
can you find anyone named Ojas?
is there anybody named John in the team?
do we have any one named Jane in any pod?
is there someone called Mike across all pods?
does the team have someone named Sarah?

categories.name: Resource Lookup — Not Found (should return clean 'not found')
categories.notes: Tests that non-existent names return proper not-found messages, not empty cards

prompts.q: is there anyone named Xyzzy in any of the pods?
how many developers do we have?

list people in the API team

projects and members of BD pod
show me who is working on what
how many days left in the current sprint?
when is the sprint lock-in date?

how many people do we have by role?
what should I focus on today?
what percentage goes to dev vs QA?
what is the bell curve pattern?
add a QA engineer from India
create a new pod called Analytics
I want to add a new project
change SgNIPT status to in discovery
compare BD pod vs Platform pod

are there any blockers I should know about?

find all open stories in CEP

are we creating more bugs than fixing?

how much cushion do we have?

how does the sprint planner work?
what if we add 2 more developers?
simulate removing a resource from BD
what happens if we delay SgNIPT by a month?
hypothetical: move 2 devs from BD to Platform
show me the March release schedule

categories.name: Edge Cases — Typos & Misspellings
categories.notes: Tests fuzzy matching and vector-based entity resolution

categories.name: Edge Cases — Ambiguous Queries
categories.notes: Tests how the system handles queries that could match multiple intents

prompts.notes: just a project name, no verb

categories.name: Edge Cases — Conversational / Natural Language
categories.notes: Tests natural phrasing that doesn't follow rigid patterns

prompts.q: I'm trying to figure out if we have enough QAs
can you help me understand our capacity situation?
I need to know who's available for the next sprint
what's the deal with project SgNIPT?
hmm, are we on track for the release?
who should I talk to about the BD pod?
I'm worried about our delivery timeline
any concerns I should be aware of?
what would you recommend I look at today?
give me a quick status on everything

categories.name: Edge Cases — Follow-up Queries (Context Required)
categories.notes: Tests session memory — these need prior context to work properly

categories.name: Edge Cases — Negative / Out-of-Scope
categories.notes: Tests graceful handling of unsupported queries

prompts.q: show me all the P0 and P1 projects that are active and assigned to the BD pod with their estimates and timeline
I need a comprehensive overview of the current sprint including allocations by pod and any blocked issues
compare the capacity and utilization of BD pod versus Platform pod for the next three months
give me a full breakdown of all resources in India including their roles, pods, rates, and current utilization
what are the top 3 risks across all projects and pods right now and what should we do about them?

categories.name: Pre-Computed Tool Route Verification
categories.notes: These should hit pre-computed routes and SKIP the first LLM call for speed

categories.name: Vector Search / Semantic Matching
categories.notes: Tests that vector-based entity resolution catches what regex misses

categories.name: Auto-Learn Candidate Queries
categories.notes: These should trigger auto-learning if resolved with >= 0.90 confidence

prompts.q: show all QA engineers in India in the BD pod
which projects have the most hours allocated?
give me the capacity gap for next month
show me resources with the highest billing rates
which pods have the most active projects?
developer cost per hour in India
resource count by role and location
who are the most expensive resources?
